meta.name: Moonlit Baron (FF4 Cecil, Kain, Rosa)
meta.source: Inspired by Final Fantasy IV: Baron nights, Cecil's redemption arc, Kain's dragoon steel, and Rosa's moonlit grace
meta.tokenConvention: Every color key maps to a CSS custom property named --<key>. e.g. "accent" -> var(--accent). The group names (surfaces, lines, text, accents, crystals, states) are for human organization only and are NOT part of the variable name. The four crystal-* tokens are extra identity colors; wire them up where supported.
meta.notExportedYet: Non-color tokens still live only in styles.css and are intentionally omitted here: --radius, --radius-s, --shadow. To push the FF4 identity further, add a subtle moonbeam gradient on elevated panels and a faint mist layer over backgrounds when non-color tokens are supported.

bg.desc: Midnight over Baron with deep lunar indigo

bg-soft.desc: Header elevation in cool pre-dawn blue

panel.desc: Primary panel tone inspired by Baron armor blue

panel-2.desc: Raised controls and cards with stronger moonlight

panel-3.desc: Highest elevation surface with crystalline night glow

line.desc: Moon-silver frame line for clear structure

line-soft.desc: Subtle divider for inner rows and sections

text.desc: Primary text with bright moonlit contrast

muted.desc: Secondary labels in cool misted blue-gray

accent.desc: Cecil paladin moonlight for core interactive emphasis

accent-dk.desc: Kain dragoon violet for active and pressed states

gold.desc: Baron crest gold for headings and highlighted totals

crystal-earth.desc: Terra-green crystal analog for grounded milestones

crystal-water.desc: Lunar water crystal analog in clear cyan-blue

done-dk.desc: Darker done shade for depth and contrast

excluded.desc: Set-aside state in muted dragoon violet

danger.desc: Critical and destructive actions with rose-red urgency
